regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran claims bunker-buster neutralized as Armenia restricts rally near Turkish Embassy
bullets: Iran claims a deep-buried bunker-buster bomb was neutralized during military conflict.
Armenian police restricted a genocide remembrance event near the Turkish Embassy under new rally laws.
Turkey indicated it may consider a role in Hormuz demining following a potential Iran-US deal.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Iranian military claims and diplomatic signals regarding US engagement.
